title: Soda's PvP Overlay For Bare Bones
description: A PvP-focused overlay that gives every sword a cleaner, shorter look—built specifically for Bare Bones players who want an edge without sacrificing the aesthetic.
body:
##
Soda's PvP Overlay x Bare Bones **A lightweight PvP-focused overlay built on top of Bare Bones**. This pack adds short swords and smaller item textures to give your PvP experience a cleaner, more competitive feel—without straying from the Bare Bones aesthetic. **⚠️ Requires bare bones to look as intended.** This is an overlay, meaning it is designed to sit on top of Bare Bones and not replace it. Load this pack above Bare Bones in your resource pack list. Supported Version: 1.21.11 #
Installation 1. Download Bare Bones and this pack 2. Place both in your resource packs folder 3. In-game, make sure this pack is loaded above Bare Bones ##
Supported Versions
![Supported versions](https://tschipcraft.ddns.net/mod_resources/supported/supported.php?not_updated_versions=&untested_versions=1.20,1.21&supported_versions=1.21.11&total_versions=1.16,1.17,1.18,1.19,1.20,1.21,1.21.11&icons=true&white_mode=false&platform=modrinth) ## FAQ
Spoiler **Do I really need Bare Bones?** Yes. This pack is an overlay, meaning it only replaces specific textures and relies on Bare Bones for everything else. Without it, the pack will look incomplete and out of place. **Why does my sword still look normal?** Make sure this pack is loaded above Bare Bones in your resource pack menu, not below it. **Is this compatible with Optifine or Iris?** It should work fine with both since it doesn't use any shader-dependent features. If you run into issues, it's likely a load order problem. **Will you add more items?** Yes, more retextures are planned for future updates. No specific timeline yet. **Does this work on servers?** Yes, resource packs are client-side, so this works on any server.
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef3dcacc0d715a97a8d98e1ebacd249004d87b9b.png) [![TikTok](https://i.imgur.com/UQpZsn5.png)](https://www.tiktok.com/@sodaplays_yt) [![YouTube](https://i.imgur.com/USGe94v.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@SodaPlays_YT/videos) [![Bluesky](https://i.imgur.com/8WtUbWY.png)](https://bsky.app/profile/sodaplays.bsky.social)

I want to give tons of credit to him! (Thanks Oculie)
